sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الرَّحَّالَةِ اسْتِخْدَامَ الْقِطَارَاتِ لِلتَّنَقُّلِ بَيْنَ الْمُدُنِ، لِمَا تُوَفِّرُهُ هَذِهِ الْوَسِيلَةُ مِنْ رَاحَةٍ وَمُتْعَةٍ بَصَرِيَّةٍ لَا تُضَاهَى.
sentences.translation: Mnogi putnici radije koriste vozove za kretanje između gradova zbog udobnosti i neusporedivog vizuelnog užitka koji ovo sredstvo pruža.
sentences.translationEn: Many travelers prefer using trains to move between cities because of the comfort and incomparable visual pleasure this means of transport provides.

sentences.arabic: فَبَيْنَمَا يَنْطَلِقُ الْقِطَارُ عَبْرَ السُّهُولِ وَالْجِبَالِ، يَتَمَكَّنُ الرَّاكِبُ مِنْ مُشَاهَدَةِ تَغَيُّرِ التَّضَارِيسِ وَالْمَنَاظِرِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ مِنْ نَافِذَتِهِ الْوَاسِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dok voz juri preko ravnica i planina, putnik može posmatrati promjenu terena i prirodnih pejzaža kroz svoj široki prozor.
sentences.translationEn: As the train speeds across plains and mountains, the passenger is able to watch the changing terrain and natural landscapes from their wide window.

sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ سِكَكُ الْحَدِيدِ شِرْيَانَ الْحَيَاةِ فِي الْعَدِيدِ مِنَ الْبُلْدَانِ، حَيْثُ تَرْبِطُ بَيْنَ الْمَرَافِقِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ وَتُسَهِّلُ حَرَكَةَ التِّجَارَةِ وَالسِّيَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Željeznice se smatraju žilom kucavicom u mnogim zemljama, jer povezuju vitalne objekte i olakšavaju kretanje trgovine i turizma.
sentences.translationEn: Railways are considered a lifeline in many countries, connecting vital facilities and facilitating the movement of trade and tourism.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الرِّحْلَةَ بِالْقِطَارِ تَمْنَحُ الْمُسَافِرَ وَقْتًا كَافِيًا لِلْقِرَاءَةِ أَوِ التَّفْكِيرِ، بَعِيدًا عَنْ ضَجِيجِ الْمُحَرِّكَاتِ النَّفَّاثَةِ وَازْدِحَامِ الْمَطَارَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje vozom daje putniku dovoljno vremena za čitanje ili razmišljanje, daleko od buke mlaznih motora i gužve na aerodromima.
sentences.translationEn: A train journey gives the traveler enough time for reading or reflection, away from the noise of jet engines and the crowding of airports.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ تَطَوُّرِ التِّكْنُولُوجْيَا، أَصْبَحَتِ الْقِطَارَاتُ السَّرِيعَةُ تَنَافِسُ الطَّائِرَاتِ فِي تَوْفِيرِ الْوَقْتِ وَالْجُهْدِ، مَعَ الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى لَمْسَةٍ مِنَ الْكَلَاسِيكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Sa razvojem tehnologije, brzi vozovi su počeli konkurisati avionima u uštedi vremena i truda, uz zadržavanje dodira klasike.
sentences.translationEn: With the development of technology, high-speed trains have begun to compete with airplanes in saving time and effort, while maintaining a touch of classicism.
